summary: A brief historical overview of the founding of Little Caesars Pizza by Mike and Marian Ilitch, highlighting their early investments, vertical integration, and Marian's view of the business as an extension of her family.

principles.statement: Treat your business and employees like family.
principles.rationale: Viewing the company as an extension of the family fosters a close-knit culture and deep dedication.
principles.source_quote: Mike and Marian have always considered Little Caesars employees as one big family.

mental_models.name: Business as a Child
mental_models.description: Viewing the creation and nurturing of a business with the same care, dedication, and emotional attachment as raising a child.
mental_models.example: Marian referred to the company as her 'eighth child.'

signature_quotes.text: I consider Little Caesars my eighth child,
signature_quotes.context: Describing her deep connection to the business and its employees.
